prompt: Create a surreal hyper-realistic macro food diorama: exactly four giant glossy crispy spicy chicken wings covered in red chili flakes, crunchy crumbs, pepper seeds, and sticky orange glaze, arranged on crumpled branded parchment paper. The parchment shows repeated golden arches and readable red text: "McDonald's Spicy Chicken Wings". Add a blurred red branded box with a large golden arch in the back left and a small freestanding red sign on the right that reads "Spicy Chicken Wings". Populate the scene with exactly 10 miniature construction workers wearing yellow hard hats and yellow shirts: 1 worker on a ladder at the top pouring chili flakes from a small sieve, 1 worker on a ladder in the left background, 1 worker standing on the right rear wing using a tool, 1 worker standing on the front wing scraping or brushing seasoning, 1 worker on a ladder leaning against the right side of the front wing, 1 worker beside a wheeled crate cart at lower left, 1 worker at lower right operating a blowtorch with a bright blue flame against the wing, 1 worker near a metal bowl of seasoning at bottom left, 1 worker standing at lower right holding a tool, and 1 partially visible worker near the bottom edge. Include tiny ladders, carts, tools, bowls, seasoning debris, and scattered crumbs for scale. Use shallow depth of field, cinematic macro photography, ultra-detailed textures, warm golden studio lighting, playful imaginative advertising style, vertical 9:16 composition, realistic reflections on glaze, no extra logos beyond the described branding, no watermark.
